productDisplayName: ADIDAS Neo Men Clemente Stripe Black Shoes
description: The Clemente Lo from adidas is a lifestyle shoe - a modern reinterpretation of the humble sneaker. Crafted from the highest quality materials, the upper features stylish, understated rivet details on the classic 3-Stripes, giving an adidas twist that makes this shoe top our wish-list for the season! men, class up your casual act with this stylish sneaker. Recommended for casual wear; looks best when worn with a matching leather jacket.UpperSynthetic upper with stitch detail at the seams of the toe boxAdidas 3-Stripe overlays at the midfoot region with rivet detailsPadded innerReinforced overlay at the heel collarCentral lace-upsPadded tongue with brandingPerforations on the toe boxMidsolePU midsole with foxing at the toe regionOutsoleTPU outsole with patterned grooves and a suction point in the outsole Shoe careWipe surface with a clean cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
